title: units §4.5 + SI prelude
manager: Physical units — phantom dimensions with an SI prelude — so a val can be typed as meters or seconds and the checker catches adding a length to a time, with zero runtime cost because units are erased after checking. This is the Mars-Climate-Orbiter class of bug (mixing unit systems) made a compile error, and it costs nothing at runtime because it is purely a type-level check that vanishes in the compiled machine.
cs: §4.5 units (phantom dimensions + SI prelude), zero runtime; dimension mismatch is a type error; erased after checking.
